subcodes.first_line: O thou heavenly personage! Thy letter was an evidence of the fact that praise be to God thou hast arisen to serve the Kingdom
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
